h({},{[O(-853981-(-853775))]=M;[O(338409+-338565)]=F,[O(-41034-(-40844))]=function()return-970785+-2395285 end})end end,function(F,O)local v=e(O)local q=function(q,h)return V(F,{q,h},O,v)end return q end return(B(11783751-(-923323),{}))(v(s))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[O(-862561+862348)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
